scripts.start: echo "Current version: v$npm_package_version"; echo "v$npm_package_version" > .running_version; sudo systemctl start nor-customs-bot.service
scripts.stop: R=$(cat .running_version 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "Current version: v$npm_package_version"; echo "Stopped version: $R"; sudo systemctl stop nor-customs-bot.service
scripts.status: R=$(cat .running_version 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "Current version: v$npm_package_version"; echo "Running version: $R"; systemctl status nor-customs-bot.service --no-pager
